content.title: The U.S. oil reserve is at a 40-year low — but the government says there’s still plenty of breathing room
content.summary: Energy Department says operational minimum for the storage caverns is about 70 million barrels, a level far lower than oil industry estimates

content.title: Food banks, affordable-housing providers scramble as inflation hammers low-income Americans
content.summary: One Dallas food bank says demand for food assistance has surpassed what was seen during the financial crisis and the pandemic, a Federal Reserve survey has found.

content.title: BlackRock has best-ever start to a year as investment flows double and profits surge
content.summary: Shares of BlackRock rallied to their best day in more than a year on Wednesday, after strong inflows into exchange-traded funds and buoyant markets helped the world’s biggest asset manager beat Wall Street’s earnings expectations for the latest quarter.

content.summary: If Korea allows mutual conversion, then the ADR premium may contract.

content.title: What the launch of SK Hynix leveraged ETFs tells us about the hottest trade on Wall Street
content.summary: Investors are still enthusiastic about the memory boom, and are looking for new ways to cash in.

content.title: AI is killing the cover letter — but here’s when it still pays to send one
content.summary: “For really everyone other than AI providers, the process is broken.”

content.title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
content.summary: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

content.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
content.summary: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

content.title: This isn’t a plan to save Social Security. It’s a plan to have a plan.
content.summary: A bipartisan group of senators, most of whom are retiring, is trying to move the ball forward just a little.

content.title: ‘They cut off online access’: My mother’s bank balance plummeted after her death. What’s going on?
content.summary: “Since her death, her bank balance fell to $9,000 from $16,000.”
